purpose.summary: The COBOL program DBUNLDGS extracts authorization summary and detail data from an IMS database and inserts it into a GSAM dataset. It reads authorization summaries and details, and then inserts them into a GSAM file.
purpose.business_context: This program is likely part of a larger system that manages and processes authorization data, potentially for auditing or reporting purposes.

inputs.name: PAUTBPCB
inputs.description: IMS database PCB for authorization data. Used to retrieve authorization summary and detail segments.

inputs.name: PADFLPCB
inputs.description: PADFLPCB is a parameter passed to the program, but its usage is not evident in the provided code snippet.

inputs.name: PASFLPCB
inputs.description: GSAM database PCB for authorization data. Used to insert authorization summary segments.

outputs.name: PENDING-AUTH-SUMMARY
outputs.description: Authorization summary records written to GSAM.

called_programs.purpose: Performs IMS database calls to retrieve and insert segments.

business_rules.description: If the PAUT-PCB-STATUS is spaces, then the program adds 1 to WS-NO-SUMRY-READ and WS-AUTH-SMRY-PROC-CNT, moves PENDING-AUTH-SUMMARY to OPFIL1-REC, initializes ROOT-SEG-KEY and CHILD-SEG-REC, moves PA-ACCT-ID to ROOT-SEG-KEY, performs 3100-INSERT-PARENT-SEG-GSAM, initializes WS-END-OF-CHILD-SEG, and performs 3000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-DTL until WS-END-OF-CHILD-SEG is equal to 'Y'.
business_rules.logic_summary: Processes authorization summary records when PAUT-PCB-STATUS is spaces.

business_rules.description: If PAUT-PCB-STATUS is 'GB', then the program sets END-OF-AUTHDB to TRUE and moves 'Y' to WS-END-OF-ROOT-SEG.
business_rules.logic_summary: Sets end of root segment flag when PAUT-PCB-STATUS is 'GB'.

business_rules.description: If PAUT-PCB-STATUS is not equal to spaces and 'GB', then the program displays an error message and performs 9999-ABEND.
business_rules.logic_summary: Abends the program if PAUT-PCB-STATUS is not spaces or 'GB'.
conditions: PAUT-PCB-STATUS NOT EQUAL TO  SPACES AND 'GB'

business_rules.description: If PAUT-PCB-STATUS is spaces, then the program sets MORE-AUTHS to TRUE, adds 1 to WS-NO-SUMRY-READ and WS-AUTH-SMRY-PROC-CNT, moves PENDING-AUTH-DETAILS to CHILD-SEG-REC, and performs 3200-INSERT-CHILD-SEG-GSAM.
business_rules.logic_summary: Processes authorization detail records when PAUT-PCB-STATUS is spaces.

business_rules.description: If PAUT-PCB-STATUS is 'GE', then the program moves 'Y' to WS-END-OF-CHILD-SEG.
business_rules.logic_summary: Sets end of child segment flag when PAUT-PCB-STATUS is 'GE'.

business_rules.description: If PAUT-PCB-STATUS is not equal to spaces and 'GE', then the program displays an error message and performs 9999-ABEND.
business_rules.logic_summary: Abends the program if PAUT-PCB-STATUS is not spaces or 'GE'.
conditions: PAUT-PCB-STATUS NOT EQUAL TO  SPACES AND 'GE'

business_rules.description: If PASFL-PCB-STATUS is not equal to spaces, then the program displays an error message and performs 9999-ABEND.
business_rules.logic_summary: Abends the program if PASFL-PCB-STATUS is not spaces.

paragraphs.purpose: This is the program entry point. It is called with the entry point 'DLITCBL' and receives the PAUTBPCB, PASFLPCB, and PADFLPCB as input parameters. The paragraph itself does not contain any logic other than a GOBACK statement, which returns control to the calling program or operating system.

This paragraph serves as the main control loop for the program. It first performs 1000-INITIALIZE to set up the program environment. Then, it repeatedly performs 2000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-SUMMARY until WS-END-OF-ROOT-SEG is set to 'Y', indicating that all authorization summaries have been processed. Finally, it performs 4000-FILE-CLOSE to close any open files before returning control to the calling program. The paragraph orchestrates the overall flow of the program by calling initialization, processing, and termination routines.

This paragraph initializes the program environment. It accepts the current date and day from the system. It then displays a series of messages to the console, including the program name and the current date. This paragraph prepares the program for processing by setting up the initial state and providing some basic logging information.
This paragraph simply contains an EXIT statement, which marks the end of the 1000-INITIALIZE paragraph and allows control to return to the calling paragraph.

This paragraph retrieves the next authorization summary record from the IMS database. It initializes PAUT-PCB-STATUS and then calls CBLTDLI with FUNC-GN to retrieve the next segment. If the call is successful (PAUT-PCB-STATUS is spaces), it increments counters, moves the data to OPFIL1-REC, initializes working storage, moves the account ID to ROOT-SEG-KEY, performs 3100-INSERT-PARENT-SEG-GSAM, initializes WS-END-OF-CHILD-SEG, and performs 3000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-DTL to process the detail records. If PAUT-PCB-STATUS is 'GB', it sets the end-of-data flag. If PAUT-PCB-STATUS is neither spaces nor 'GB', it displays an error message and abends the program. This paragraph handles the retrieval and processing of authorization summary records, including error handling and calls to other paragraphs for detail processing and GSAM insertion.
This paragraph simply contains an EXIT statement, which marks the end of the 2000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-SUMMARY paragraph and allows control to return to the calling paragraph.

This paragraph retrieves the next authorization detail record from the IMS database. It calls CBLTDLI with FUNC-GNP to retrieve the next segment. If the call is successful (PAUT-PCB-STATUS is spaces), it sets MORE-AUTHS to TRUE, increments counters, moves the data to CHILD-SEG-REC, and performs 3200-INSERT-CHILD-SEG-GSAM. If PAUT-PCB-STATUS is 'GE', it sets the end-of-child-segment flag. If PAUT-PCB-STATUS is neither spaces nor 'GE', it displays an error message and abends the program. Finally, it initializes PAUT-PCB-STATUS. This paragraph handles the retrieval and processing of authorization detail records, including error handling and calls to other paragraphs for GSAM insertion.
This paragraph simply contains an EXIT statement, which marks the end of the 3000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-DTL paragraph and allows control to return to the calling paragraph.

This paragraph inserts the parent segment (authorization summary) into the GSAM dataset. It calls CBLTDLI with FUNC-ISRT to perform the insertion using the PASFLPCB. If the call is not successful (PASFL-PCB-STATUS is not spaces), it displays an error message and abends the program. This paragraph ensures that the authorization summary data is written to the GSAM file, handling potential errors during the insertion process.
This paragraph simply contains an EXIT statement, which marks the end of the 3100-INSERT-PARENT-SEG-GSAM paragraph and allows control to return to the calling paragraph.

error_handling.condition: PAUT-PCB-STATUS NOT EQUAL TO  SPACES AND 'GB'
PAUT-PCB-STATUS NOT EQUAL TO  SPACES AND 'GE'
